text: In the event of any occurrence, claim, loss or damage which arises out of, is incurred by, or is in any way connected with the Work, whether during construction or after completion of the Work or both, Contractor will be responsible for repayment of any deductible up to $50,000 per occurrence to the extent loss costs payable are attributable to its acts or the acts of its Subcontractors, or any other entity or person for whom it may be responsible.
